criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance learning experiences.
criteria.sources: App documentation, user reviews, and expert analyses.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: Measures user interaction levels, including active users and session durations.
criteria.sources: App analytics reports and user statistics.

criteria.name: Educational Impact
criteria.description: Effectiveness in improving learning outcomes, based on studies and user feedback.
criteria.sources: Educational research studies and user testimonials.

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: Availability across different platforms and support for diverse user needs.
criteria.sources: App availability information and accessibility features documentation.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: Uniqueness and novelty of the app's features and approach to education.
criteria.sources: App feature descriptions and industry reviews.
